## Checklist

Before requesting review, confirm:

* [ ] I worked on a separate branch, not directly on `main`
* [ ] I pulled the latest version of `main` before opening this PR
* [ ] My code/notebook runs without errors
* [ ] I removed unnecessary test/debug code
* [ ] I used clear file/variable names
* [ ] I updated the README or documentation if needed
* [ ] I did not upload large unnecessary files
* [ ] I added comments or explanations where helpful
